languages.text:
Unlocks the upgraded version of {g|f:a100b760a08545abbffb3ddc70197962}Magnarail Chain{/g} that can be used in the same turn with other weapons.
This augment is considered a right hand's augment. Protects from the right hand's trauma.

traits.locale_text:
Unlocks the upgraded version of {g|f:a100b760a08545abbffb3ddc70197962}Magnarail Chain{/g} that can be used in the same turn with other weapons.
This augment is considered a right hand's augment. Protects from the right hand's trauma.

languages.text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

languages.text:
Этот модифицированный лэнс-излучатель дает Эоганну улучшенную версию способности {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Магнарельсовый залп{/g}. Она не входит в лимит атак за ход.
Этот аугмент считается установленным в инсерцию правой руки. Эоганн не может получить {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалеченную правую руку{/g}.

This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

Этот модифицированный лэнс-излучатель дает Эоганну улучшенную версию способности {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Магнарельсовый залп{/g}. Она не входит в лимит атак за ход.
Этот аугмент считается установленным в инсерцию правой руки. Эоганн не может получить {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалеченную правую руку{/g}.

languages.text:
Esta lanza otorga a Eogunn la versión mejorada de la capacidad {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Descarga encadenada{/g}. No cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno.
Se considera que este aumento es un injerto de lado diestro. Eogunn no puede sufrir un {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Esta lanza otorga a Eogunn la versión mejorada de la capacidad {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Descarga encadenada{/g}. No cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno.
Se considera que este aumento es un injerto de lado diestro. Eogunn no puede sufrir un {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}.

languages.text:
Diese modifizierte Lanze gewährt Eogunn die verbesserte Version der Fähigkeit {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Kettenentladung{/g}. Diese fließt nicht in das Angriffslimit pro Zug ein.
Diese Augmentation wird als Geschicklichkeitseinsatz gewertet. Eogunn kann keinen {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}verkrüppelten rechten Arm{/g} erleiden.
languages.original_text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Diese modifizierte Lanze gewährt Eogunn die verbesserte Version der Fähigkeit {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Kettenentladung{/g}. Diese fließt nicht in das Angriffslimit pro Zug ein.
Diese Augmentation wird als Geschicklichkeitseinsatz gewertet. Eogunn kann keinen {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}verkrüppelten rechten Arm{/g} erleiden.

languages.text:
Cette lance modifiée confère à Eogunn la version améliorée de la capacité {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Décharge multiple{/g}, qui n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour.
Cette augmentation est considérée comme une insertion dextre. Eogunn ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Bras droit mutilé{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Cette lance modifiée confère à Eogunn la version améliorée de la capacité {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Décharge multiple{/g}, qui n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour.
Cette augmentation est considérée comme une insertion dextre. Eogunn ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Bras droit mutilé{/g}.

languages.text:
Bu modifiye mızrak, Eogunn'a {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Zincirleme Salınım{/g} kabiliyetinin geliştirilmiş hâlini kazandırır. Tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz.
Bu ogment, dekstral eklenti yuvasına takılmış kabul edilir. Eogunn, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kol{/g} travmasına uğrayamaz.
languages.original_text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Bu modifiye mızrak, Eogunn'a {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Zincirleme Salınım{/g} kabiliyetinin geliştirilmiş hâlini kazandırır. Tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz.
Bu ogment, dekstral eklenti yuvasına takılmış kabul edilir. Eogunn, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kol{/g} travmasına uğrayamaz.

languages.text:
改装后的长矛赋予伊奥贡升级版{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}连环闪电{/g}能力。其不计入每回合的攻击上限。
此植入物视为右侧植入。伊奥贡不会{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右臂骨折{/g}。
languages.original_text:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
改装后的长矛赋予伊奥贡升级版{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}连环闪电{/g}能力。其不计入每回合的攻击上限。
此植入物视为右侧植入。伊奥贡不会{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右臂骨折{/g}。

languages.text:
この改造ランスはエオガンに{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}連鎖放電{/g}アビリティのアップグレード版を付与する。これはターンあたりの攻撃回数制限にカウントされない。
このオーグメティックは器用挿入部にあるものとみなされる。エオガンは{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右腕損傷{/g}を負わない。
languages.original_text:

This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

この改造ランスはエオガンに{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}連鎖放電{/g}アビリティのアップグレード版を付与する。これはターンあたりの攻撃回数制限にカウントされない。
このオーグメティックは器用挿入部にあるものとみなされる。エオガンは{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右腕損傷{/g}を負わない。
